questionHtml: Find the probability that more than 100 cakes will be sold on a typical day.
markschemeHtml:
let X be the number of customers who order cake

X ~ B(200,0.45)        (M1)

P(X > 100) = P(X ≥ 101)(= 1 − P(X ≤ 100))    (M1)

= 0.0681      A1

 

[3 marks]

meta.title: Find the probability that more than 100 cakes will be sold on a typical day.
